attributes.title: [Cassandra OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of Apache Cassandra cluster health from OTel JMX metrics: client request latency, throughput, errors, compaction, and storage.

params.markdown:
## [Cassandra OTel] Overview

This dashboard monitors Apache Cassandra cluster health from JMX metrics:
- Client request latency (p50, p99) by operation and node
- Request throughput and error rates by operation and status
- Compaction health (pending vs completed tasks)
- Storage load and hints per node

query.esql:
TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count))

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count))

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL OR cassandra.client.request.error.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_req = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count)), total_err = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.error.count))
| EVAL error_rate = CASE(total_req > 0, total_err / total_req, 0)

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL OR cassandra.client.request.error.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_req = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count)), total_err = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.error.count))
| EVAL error_rate = CASE(total_req > 0, total_err / total_req, 0)

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.compaction.tasks.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(cassandra.compaction.tasks.pending))

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.compaction.tasks.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(cassandra.compaction.tasks.pending))

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE `cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL
| STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p`))
| EVAL p99_ms = p99_us / 1000

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE `cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL
| STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p`))
| EVAL p99_ms = p99_us / 1000

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE `cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL
| STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| EVAL p99_ms = p99_us / 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE `cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL
| STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| EVAL p99_ms = p99_us / 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE `cassandra.client.request.write.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL
| STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.write.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| EVAL p99_ms = p99_us / 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE `cassandra.client.request.write.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL
| STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.write.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| EVAL p99_ms = p99_us / 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| FORK ( WHERE `cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL | STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address | EVAL op = "Read" ) ( WHERE `cassandra.client.request.write.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL | STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.write.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address | EVAL op = "Write" ) ( WHERE `cassandra.client.request.range_slice.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL | STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.range_slice.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address | EVAL op = "RangeSlice" )
| STATS p99_us = AVG(p99_us) BY time_bucket, server.address, op
| EVAL p99_ms = p99_us / 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| FORK ( WHERE `cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL | STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.read.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address | EVAL op = "Read" ) ( WHERE `cassandra.client.request.write.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL | STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.write.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address | EVAL op = "Write" ) ( WHERE `cassandra.client.request.range_slice.latency.99p` IS NOT NULL | STATS p99_us = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(`cassandra.client.request.range_slice.latency.99p`)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address | EVAL op = "RangeSlice" )
| STATS p99_us = AVG(p99_us) BY time_bucket, server.address, op
| EVAL p99_ms = p99_us / 1000
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.operation
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.operation
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.error.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS error_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.error.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.status
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.error.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS error_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.error.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.status
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.error.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS error_count = SUM(INCREASE(cassandra.client.request.error.count)) BY attributes.operation, attributes.status
| EVAL op_status = CONCAT(attributes.operation, " - ", COALESCE(attributes.status, "unknown"))
| STATS error_count = SUM(error_count) BY op_status
| SORT error_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.error.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS error_count = SUM(INCREASE(cassandra.client.request.error.count)) BY attributes.operation, attributes.status
| EVAL op_status = CONCAT(attributes.operation, " - ", COALESCE(attributes.status, "unknown"))
| STATS error_count = SUM(error_count) BY op_status
| SORT error_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.compaction.tasks.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(cassandra.compaction.tasks.pending)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.compaction.tasks.pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(cassandra.compaction.tasks.pending)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.compaction.tasks.completed IS NOT NULL
| STATS completed_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.compaction.tasks.completed)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.compaction.tasks.completed IS NOT NULL
| STATS completed_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.compaction.tasks.completed)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.storage.load.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS load_bytes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(cassandra.storage.load.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.storage.load.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS load_bytes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(cassandra.storage.load.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.storage.total_hints.in_progress.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS hints_in_progress = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(cassandra.storage.total_hints.in_progress.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.storage.total_hints.in_progress.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS hints_in_progress = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(cassandra.storage.total_hints.in_progress.count)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), server.address
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Request Rate by Node and Operation

query.esql:
TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count)) BY server.address, attributes.operation
| SORT request_rate DESC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
| WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS request_rate = SUM(RATE(cassandra.client.request.count)) BY server.address, attributes.operation
| SORT request_rate DESC
| LIMIT 100
